name: Linguini Spring Vegetables & Herb Sauce - Scully on Spring
recipeIngredient: 10 Cremini mushrooms, cleaned and sliced thin
4 Baby artichokes, hearts only, sliced thin; reserve in lemon water to avoid discoloration
1 Red bell pepper, seeded and sliced into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 4 quarts of water to a boil with oil and salt.
2. Prepare all vegetables: Blanch asparagus, Fava beans, and artichokes for 2 minutes, then refresh in an ice bath. Reserve the liquid to rehydrate sundried tomatoes.
3. Slice Cremini mushrooms, peppers, Cipollini onions, Sundried tomatoes, and asparagus into thin pieces.
4. Chop garlic fine and grate cheese.
5. Heat a large saute pan with 2 tablespoons vegetable oil over medium flame.
6. Add the chopped garlic, sliced onions, bell pepper, and mushrooms; cook for 2-3 minutes until they begin to brown.
7. Add sundried tomatoes and all other vegetables; continue cooking for 5 minutes, stirring often.
8. Season with salt and pepper, add herb puree, and extra virgin olive oil; toss everything for 2 minutes.
9. Adjust seasoning as needed and sprinkle grated cheese into the pasta while continuing to toss.
10. Serve hot in large bowls. Additional cheese can be grated on top. Garnish with a sprig of parsley.
For additional spice, add crushed red pepper to the vegetables while cooking.
Store herb puree in an airtight container for future use.
